prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约7126→7287→5893→4770→4363名，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），2021至2025年累计前移约2763名，近3年（2023→20 25）前移约1530名，2025年基准位次约4363名，为近5年最高水平；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划：2021年196人、2022年205人、2023年201人、2024年189人、2 025年178人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划189人，较2025年扩招11人（+6.18%），扩招对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北工业大学为985工程、211工程、 双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第23名（2021年第25名→2025年第21名→2026年第23名），稳居全国前25强，属于顶尖工科院校，在国防军工领域具有不可替代的地位。 2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生被地方黑恶势力殴打、校方被指偏袒不作为），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音 综合热度排名第74位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等；历史投档异常记录中未见西工大在江苏有明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，航空宇航科学与技术A+ 、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，其中3个A+学科，在航空航天、计算 机、材料领域处于全国顶尖水平，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等 与西工大优势学科高度匹配的专业大类持续升温，利好该校报考热度；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约35.8万人大幅增加，物理类考生 估算约38万人（较2025年物理类26万人增约45%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。省控线数据：2025年江苏物理类本科批463分、特殊类型招生控制线519分，2026年省控线数据 缺失，；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市，在江苏省属跨省招生；该校在江苏物理类招生计划约占其全国物理类总计划的较小比例，地域偏好因素不 显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势（反映学校认可度逐年提升）、2026年小幅扩招（+11人）、江苏省考生总数大幅增加（物理类增约45%）、学校顶尖工科实力 与优势专业热度持续走高、声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年4363名基础上继续前移但幅度收窄。预测最低位次约4445名（位次数字较2025年增 大82名，反映竞争略加剧），位次区间3945–4945名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7126 → 7287 → 5893 → 4770 → 4363, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative improvement of about 2763 places from 2021 to 2025, and about 1530 places in the last three years (2023→2025). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4363, the highest in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu: 196 in 2021, 205 in 2022, 201 in 2023, 189 in 2024, and 178 in 2025, showing a gradual annual decrease. The 2026 plan is 189, an increase of 11 (+6.18%) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 23rd (25th in 2021 → 21st in 2025 → 23rd in 2026), consistently among the top 25 nationally. It is a top-tier engineering institution with an irreplaceable position in the national defense and military industry. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation is slightly negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents (students assaulted by local criminal forces, the university accused of favoritism and inaction), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 74th (rated as "average"), with moderate short video exposure. There are no obvious signs of abnormal application records for NPU in Jiangsu. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has A+ in Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Materials Science and Engineering; A in Mechanical Engineering; A- in Control Science and Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above, including 3 A+ disciplines. It is nationally top-tier in aerospace, computer science, and materials, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), which are highly aligned with NPU's advantageous disciplines, continue to heat up, benefiting the university's application popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu Gaokao is approximately 521,000, a significant increase from the combined total of about 358,000 for Physics and History categories in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 380,000 (an increase of about 45% from 260,000 in 2025), leading to intensified competition. Provincial control line data: In 2025, Jiangsu Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 463 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 519 points. Data for 2026 is missing. NPU is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Jiangsu. Its enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu accounts for a relatively small proportion of its total national Physics Category plan, so regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (reflecting the university's increasing recognition year by year), the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+11 students), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu (Physics Category up about 45%), the university's top-tier engineering strength and the rising popularity of advantageous majors, and the slightly negative reputation with limited impact, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to improve from the 2025 baseline of 4363, but at a narrowing pace. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4445 (ranking number increased by 82 compared to 2025, reflecting slightly intensified competition), with a ranking range of 3945–4945.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3945–4945, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation). Tier 1 top talent/base classes can be attempted as reach schools (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range). Tier 3 Materials/Mathematics/Physics classes can serve as safety schools. NPU implements major-based enrollment in 2026, and during major selection, students can freely choose any major within the class. When applying, prioritize classes containing advantageous disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2896 → 3060 → 2928 → 2793 → 2510, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward movement of about 386 places from 2021 to 2025. The 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 2510, the best level in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province: 11 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. Starting from 2024, there was a significant expansion and it remained stable. The 2026 plan is 24 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking. It is a top-tier engineering university, but its influence in humanities and social sciences is relatively limited. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), and its Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 74). There are no obvious signs of a significant drop in History Category admissions for NPU in Jiangsu. NPU's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in aerospace, computer science, materials, and other engineering fields. The History Category enrollment majors (Economics and Trade, Foreign Languages and Literature, Business Administration, Marxist Theory) have weak connections with the university's A+ disciplines, and the disciplinary support is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Economics/Economic majors are in a wait-and-see state, foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see, and business administration majors are clearly discouraged. The overall social popularity of History Category enrollment majors is neutral to cold. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Jiangsu Province is approximately 521,000, with an estimated 141,000 History Category examinees (an increase of about 45% compared to 97,000 in 2025), indicating a significant expansion in the number of examinees and intensified competition. Provincial control line data: In 2025, the Jiangsu History Category undergraduate batch line was 482 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 537 points. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and it is a cross-province enrollment in Jiangsu. The History Category enrollment plan is 24 students, accounting for a small proportion, and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of fluctuating forward movement in rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province (about 45% increase), the weak connection between History Category enrollment majors and the university's advantageous disciplines, and the neutral to cold social popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 2510. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2450 (a decrease of 60 places compared to 2025, reflecting slightly intensified competition), with a ranking range of 2082–2818.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Business Administration (Management Pilot Class)
- Economics and Trade (International Trade, Law, Public Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, German).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: NPU offers only 4 enrollment majors for History Category in Jiangsu, with an enrollment plan of 24 students, providing limited choices. For rankings within the predicted range of 2082–2818, it is recommended to focus on Economics and Trade and Business Administration as primary choices, with Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option. The Marxist Theory major requires a re-selection of Ideological and Political, and eligible candidates can consider it as a backup.
